name: app-icon-6str-5
prompt: Keep this exact electric guitar: same diagonal pose (body lower-left, headstock upper-right), same body shape, colors, thick dark-brown outlines, glossy style and transparent background. Change ONE thing: draw the fretboard with EXACTLY SIX strings — six evenly-spaced parallel strings running the full length of the neck from the headstock down onto the body (count them: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6). Exactly six strings, not four, not five, not seven. Put six matching tuning pegs on the headstock. Keep it a single isolated guitar on a fully transparent background, no face, no other objects.
